svg.title: Stack vs heap memory layout — corrected
svg.desc: Stack on the left with two function frames. Each frame holds only its own locals. Arrows from stack pointers cross to the heap on the right where the actual String bytes and Vec elements live.
svg.text: variable size · lives until owner drops

g.text: Size of every slot known at compile time
Frame erased the moment function returns
Holds: i32, bool, &str, String control block
Size may be unknown at compile time
Lives as long as its owner lives
Holds: String bytes, Vec elements, Box<T>
